items.title: Marine declared dead after falling overboard in Caribbean
items.description: Lance Cpl. Chukwuemeka E. Oforah died at the age of 21 after falling overboard from the USS Iwo Jima, the Marine Corps said.

items.title: Poll analysis on words voters pick to describe Republican, Democratic parties
items.description: Most voters call the Democratic Party weak, while most describe the GOP as extreme.

items.title: Senate fails to advance DHS funding, teeing up partial shutdown
items.description: The Senate failed to advance a measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security on Thursday, paving the way for another partial government shutdown...

items.title: 1/15: The Takeout with Major Garrett
items.description: Venezuelan opposition leader meets with President Trump at White House; Poll suggests Talarico leading Crockett in Texas Senate primary

items.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
items.description: Savannah's Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1, and authorities have still not identified a possible suspect.
